segments.text: Yeah, you can't grab that though, right?
segments.original_text: いやーそうなんだね 掴めないですよねあれ

segments.text: From that Illusion setup we saw earlier, the down air mashing gets through
segments.original_text: イリュージョンから先ほど見た展開ですが 空下の暴れが通ります

segments.text: Yeah, it's just an up smash
segments.original_text: いやーただの技で上スマッシュさあ

full_text: Yeah, you can't grab that though, right? From that Illusion setup we saw earlier, the down air mashing gets through Yeah, it's just an up smash

corrections.rule: misheard: フィリュージョン→イリュージョン (Fox's side B)
